issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling for backup failures or network interruptions.
The instructions contain verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.
The skill is limited to Linux/macOS and does not support Windows environments.
Backup uploads to S3 lack server-side encryption specification, exposing data at rest.

scenarios.name: postgresql-automated-backup-with-pitr
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items (pg_dump, WAL config, verification, and mentions rotation) while Response B lacks pg_dump, row‑count verification, and rotation policy.

scenarios.name: mysql-disaster-recovery-runbook
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but lacks a stakeholder communication template, while Response B omits the mysqldump command, verification query, and communication template.
